creator: thierry@FreeBSD.org
text:
Hello Yuri,

Of course I could accept your patch - it wont break anything ;-)
but just to understand your reason:

isn't it possible for you to write something like:
LIB_DEPENDS=libvtkCDIReader.so:science/paraview
or any other non-versioned library?

The case of VTK is different because there are several ports math/vtk* and we need to specify the needed one, but ATM we only have one paraview port.
